title: Determining Local Rank Map Size

summary: The lesson explains how to determine the appropriate size for a local rank map by analyzing the top player's ranking. If the top player has a 100% rank, the map might be too small and should be rerun without city names. Conversely, if the top player is below 32%, the map may be too large and needs to be tightened or adjusted.
key_points: Rerun without city name if necessary
Adjust based on top player's rank
